rationale: Resolved every file:line citation against the tree at 57d043fb (verified == 8020b3e2 + plan.md; git clean). All load-bearing anchors are EXACT: orphans.go :74/:28/:29/:40/:41/:95/:101/:54/:71-73/:75-83; impl.go :13/:27-45/:114-131/:140/:226-227/:249/:310-313/:327-340/:343-348/:352-357/:364/:372/:452; impl_test.go :75/:299/:714; panel_advisory.go :295/:310/:329/:519-584/:529/:546/:554-566/:578/:605/:624; bdcli.go :202-217; mindspec_executor.go :44-46/:349/:383/:385/:396-398 (phrase 'rule as CompleteBead' on :398); worktree.go :21; gitops.go :94-100/:446 (exit-1 discrimination confirmed); complete.go :111/:307-321/:387/:492-495/:576-579, step 3.75 at :558; gate.go :30; claude.go :681/:736; workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml:9 sole claimant repo-wide. Three consumer call sites exist. Negative fences 0-hit; gitutil diff vs main empty; all four discriminator SHAs are commits; every new symbol/test name 0-hit at HEAD and eb6a2ed1; AC9 greps 0 as claimed; ADR-0037 §1 amendment chain (:32-150) ends with the 2026-07-10 spec-114 refutations block at :135; sxjc drift claims verified; no approve import in complete/lifecycle/gitutil (acyclic). mindspec validate plan passes. Two cosmetic drifts noted below; neither impairs any proof.

findings.item: §3 orphans.go anchors (FindOrphanedClosedBeads:74, seams :28/:29/:40/:41, consumed :95/:101, RecoveryCommand:54, parity doc :71-73, epic/list pair :75-83)

§3 impl.go anchors (MergeBase:249, planErr:226-227, adrResult:310-313, readPlanBeadIDs:452, call-order doc :114-131, seams :27-45, bead import :13, reconcile :327-340, MUTATION :343-348, done-write :352-357, CommitCount :364, FinalizeEpic :372, EnsureMigrated :140)

findings.note: All exact; predicate extraction shape matches the actual code structure.

findings.item: §3 executor/bead/workspace/gitutil anchors (WorktreeList bdcli.go:202-217, defaultWorktreeOps.List :44-46, FinalizeEpic:349, WorktreeOps.List:383, HasPrefix:385, 'rule as CompleteBead' :397-398, BeadBranchPrefix worktree.go:21, BranchExists gitops.go:94-100, IsAncestor:446 with exit-1 discrimination)
findings.note: All exact. Nit: plan says the phrase 'sits alone on :398' — :398 also carries '; mutates nothing on a block.'; location correct, AC8 grep-pair unaffected.
internal/lifecycle/** at workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml:9, sole match across all .mindspec/domains/*/OWNERSHIP.yaml. complete.go:111 seam, next.go:459, doctor/orphaned_beads.go:16 all present.

ScanOrphanedClosedBeads, ClosedEpicBeadIDs, CheckPendingObligations, and all named new Test* functions: 0 hits at HEAD and at eb6a2ed1. All four discriminator SHAs (eb6a2ed1/77d8a1a9/18cc59d9/bcb255eb) resolve as commits. AC9 greps ('impl approve' in ADR-0037; 'closed without' in claude.go + both SKILL.md copies) all 0 today, exactly as the plan claims. Negative fences (BranchExistsE repo-wide, show-ref in internal/) 0-hit; git diff main -- internal/gitutil/ empty.
No import of internal/approve anywhere in internal/complete, internal/lifecycle, or internal/gitutil — the three new approve→X edges are acyclic as claimed.

panel.ForBead (panel.go:269), panel.Tally (tally.go:313), Result.UnresolvedVerdicts (tally.go:173), completeGetMetadataFn/completeMergeMetadataFn, WorktreeListEntry.Branch (bdcli.go:182), guard/recovery_convention_test.go, finalize_orphan_test.go, merge_conflict_test.go, and the docs pre-draft at /Users/Max/.claude/jobs/06840a22/tmp/spec-115-docs-predraft.md all exist.
mindspec validate plan 115-impl-approve-panel-gate: 'all checks passed', exit 0; worktree left clean.

Drift claims verified (both materialized copies say 'mindspec approve impl' and lack the managed-by marker; the embedded literal has it). Cosmetic: 'refreshManagedSkill' is not an actual function — it exists only as a name inside claude.go:679-680's own doc comment (the real mechanism is installSkills/matchesShipped + stripManagedByMarker in internal/setup/skills.go). The plan mirrors the repo's comment verbatim and the guidance is actionable; no change required, but a bead-brief author should know the grep target is skills.go.

§1 spans :32-150; the 2026-07-10 spec-114 refutations block at :135 is the last §1 amendment, so 'append directly after it' resolves unambiguously. §7 hatches at :267 as referenced. Amendment convention format confirmed.

Pre-existing TestPanelGateRoots_LayoutAware (panel_gate_layout_test.go:71/:74) contains the substring 'PanelGateRoots', so a bare symbol-grep for the new export would be pre-GREEN. No plan proof uses such a grep (Bead 1's discriminators are the named new tests), so this is informational only — bead briefs should not add a 'PanelGateRoots' grep discriminator.
